summary: Classified the ten inventory PRs independently. No shared canonical exists for this shard, no security-sensitive refs were present, and job permissions disable merge, fix PRs, instant close, and low-signal closeout. All actions are non-mutating keep/needs-human classifications based on the hydrated preflight artifact.
